summary: Iteration 6 - OAuth Flow, Token Encryption & Background Scheduler. Full backend (26 tests) and frontend (Playwright) testing completed. All new features working: 1) Token encryption with Fernet, 2) Booking.com in PLATFORM_CONFIGS, 3) OAuth URL generation, 4) OAuth callback token exchange, 5) Token refresh endpoint, 6) Connection status endpoint, 7) APScheduler running every minute for auto-publishing.

feature_verification.booking_config_structure: PASS - Booking.com has auth_type=api_key with api_key+client_id required fields
feature_verification.oauth_url_requires_credentials: PASS - Returns 400 'save credentials first' if no credentials exist
feature_verification.oauth_url_generates_correctly: PASS - Returns auth_url, state, redirect_uri for OAuth2 platforms
feature_verification.oauth_callback_validates_state: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid state parameter
feature_verification.oauth_callback_attempts_token_exchange: PASS - With valid state but fake code, fails at token exchange (expected)
feature_verification.token_refresh_requires_refresh_token: PASS - Returns 400 if no refresh token available
feature_verification.connection_status_returns_safe_data: PASS - Does not expose access_token or refresh_token
feature_verification.token_encryption_fernet: PASS - Credentials saved with encryption (verified via masked GET)
feature_verification.scheduler_startup: PASS - 'Background scheduler started' message in logs
feature_verification.scheduler_job_execution: PASS - Job runs every minute, found and processed due posts
feature_verification.scheduler_auto_publish: PASS - Logs show 'Found 1 scheduled posts due for publishing'
feature_verification.frontend_oauth_callback_page: PASS - Displays 'Connection Failed' with error message
feature_verification.frontend_oauth_back_button: PASS - 'Back to Platforms' button works and redirects
feature_verification.frontend_configure_dialog: PASS - Shows Client ID, Client Secret inputs and Redirect URI

action_items: Booking.com platform needs to be enabled by Super Admin for the test client to appear on Platforms page (this is expected behavior - platform configs exist but client needs it enabled)
critical_code_review_comments: Token encryption using Fernet (cryptography library) is implemented correctly in encryption.py
OAuth state tokens are properly stored and validated for CSRF protection
APScheduler runs in-process with FastAPI and checks every minute (proper async implementation)
Scheduler correctly marks posts as 'publishing' → 'published'/'partial'/'failed' based on results
OAuth token exchange hits real provider URLs - will fail with test credentials (MOCKED scenario)
Actual platform posting is still MOCKED - creates social_posts records but doesn't call external APIs

success_rate.frontend: 100% - OAuth callback page and Platforms page verified

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed credentials and scheduled posts created/cleaned up during testing

mocked_apis_list: OAuth token exchange - hits real OAuth provider URLs but with test credentials will fail
Platform API calls for posting - scheduler creates social_posts but doesn't post to external APIs

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 features fully tested: Token encryption (Fernet), OAuth URL generation, OAuth callback with state validation, token refresh, connection status, APScheduler for auto-publishing, Booking.com platform config. All 7 platform configs verified (google, facebook, instagram, linkedin, x, tripadvisor, booking). Frontend OAuth callback page properly handles errors with 'Connection Failed' display and back button. Scheduler runs every minute and processes due posts. Booking.com is in backend configs but not shown on Platforms page because Super Admin needs to enable it for the client. Test file: test_iteration6_oauth_encryption.py (26 tests).
